blockers.closure_requirement: Human reviewer confirms authoritative branch refs before extraction.
blockers.description: Prompt commit counts differ from local git evidence.
blockers.evidence: Prompt stated 67 source-unique and 50 main-unique commits; local git observed 50 source-unique and 55 main-unique at analysis time.
